feed.title: ASmap dashboard: tracking the asmap-data history against the observed network

entry.title: ASmap dashboard: tracking the asmap-data history against the observed network
entry.summary: The analysis of changes involving IP addresses that host nodes can provide valuable insights, particularly when a significant number of them are involved. Investigating the software or versions utilized by these nodes in conjunction with such changes can reveal important trends and implications for network management and security. This approach helps in understanding the broader impact and potential issues that might arise from shifts within the network infrastructure. By focusing on both the quantity of IPs and the specific technologies they employ, one can gain a deeper understanding of the operational environment and its dynamics.
